description: 创业公司创始人转战职场 — 非传统 title、多角色混合经历，测试 Agent 如何提炼可迁移技能
summary: Technical founder with 6 years building startups from zero to scale. Raised $2.5M in venture funding, led product and engineering. Now seeking a senior IC or engineering leadership role where I can focus on building great products.

workExperience.title: Co-Founder & CTO
description: Built BNPL platform for Indian SMBs from scratch — React Native + Go + PostgreSQL on AWS
Grew to 50K merchants, $15M annual GMV, 12-person team (8 engineers)
Raised $2.5M seed round from Accel and Blume Ventures
Personally wrote 60% of backend code in first year, then transitioned to engineering management
Implemented PCI-DSS compliant payment infrastructure, 99.95% uptime

workExperience.title: Founder & Solo Developer
description: Built and launched a QR-code digital menu SaaS for restaurants during COVID
Acquired 500+ paying restaurants across 3 countries, $8K MRR at peak
Acquired by a POS company for $120K (asset sale)

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Backend engineer on the payments team, processing 1M+ transactions/day
Optimized payment gateway routing, improving success rate from 92% to 97%
Built fraud detection rule engine that reduced chargebacks by 30%

education.description: GPA 8.5/10. ACM ICPC regionalist. Built hostel room booking system still in use today.

awards: ET Startup Awards — Best Fintech Startup Nominee
